title: XPeng Reports Narrower Losses and Record Sales, But Warns on Growth Outlook
text: XPeng reported narrower losses and record sales in Q4 2025, achieving the company's first-ever quarterly profit of RMB 383.2 million with a record-high gross margin of 21.3%. However, the company's forward guidance for Q1 2026 warned of a deceleration in growth momentum. Deliveries for 2025 reached 429,445 units, representing 125.9% year-over-year growth, and overseas deliveries nearly doubled to 45,000 units. The guidance's implied year-over-year revenue decline for Q1 2026 raised questions about the durability of XPeng's recent margin improvements. The core challenge for investors is whether the company can maintain profitability while facing intensifying price competition in the Chinese EV market.
